checks.name: bootstrap-preload-root-cause
checks.detail: Evidence shows an external stale NODE_OPTIONS preload path caused Node startup failure before HappyTG ran any repo-managed preload logic.

checks.name: bootstrap-diagnostics-fix
checks.detail: install.ps1 and install.sh now classify broken external vs bootstrap/workspace-local preload paths and no longer misreport Node as missing when Node is present.

checks.name: warning-classification
checks.detail: Telegram/Codex/Mini App warnings remain truthful; only diagnostics noise and false bootstrap messaging were reduced.

checks.name: tui-indicator-fix
checks.detail: The running-step glyph is now ASCII-safe and the status rows regain consistent colorized indicators.

checks.name: repo-verification
checks.detail: pnpm build, pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm test all passed.

checks.name: proof-bundle-synchronized
checks.detail: Canonical split test artifacts were added, verifier metadata was synchronized, and task validate was rerun after the bundle moved to complete/passed.
